  constructor

    have h₁ : a * b - c = 2 ^ d := hd
    have h₂ : b * c - a = 2 ^ e := he
    have h₃ : c * a - b = 2 ^ f := hf
    have h₄ : 0 < a := ha
    have h₅ : 0 < b := hb
    have h₆ : 0 < c := hc
    clear ha hb hc hab hbc hd he hf
    have : a ≤ 3 := by
      contrapose! h₁
      nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d]
    have : b ≤ 6 := by
      contrapose! h₂
      nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) e]
    have : c ≤ 11 := by
      contrapose! h₃
      nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) f]
    interval_cases a <;> interval_cases b <;> interval_cases c <;>
      simp_all (config := {decide := true})
  · rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl) <;>
      simp_all (config := {decide := true})

apply Set.ext
  intro x
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Prod.mk.inj_iff]
  rcases x with ⟨a, b, c⟩
  constructor
  · intro ⟨h₀, h₁, h₂, h₃, h₄⟩
    have : a ≤ b ∧ b ≤ c := h₁
    have h₀' : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c := h₀

    rcases h₂ with ⟨d₁, h₂⟩
    rcases h₃ with ⟨d₂, h₃⟩
    rcases h₄ with ⟨d₃, h₄⟩
    have h₂' : a * b > c := by linarith
    have h₃' : b * c > a := by linarith
    have h₄' : c * a > b := by linarith
    have : a ≥ 2 := by
      cases' a with a
      · linarith
      cases' a with a
      · linarith
      linarith
    have : b ≥ 2 := by
      cases' b with b
      · linarith
      cases' b with b
      · linarith
      linarith
    have : c ≥ 2 := by
      cases' c with c
      · linarith
      cases' c with c
      · linarith
      linarith
    have : a ≤ 3 := by
      contrapose! h₂'
      nlinarith
    have : b ≤ 6 := by
      contrapose! h₃'
      nlinarith
    have : c ≤ 11 := by
      contrapose! h₄'
      nlinarith
    interval_cases a <;> interval_cases b <;> interval_cases c <;>
      simp_all (config := {decide := true})
  · rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl) <;>
      simp_all (config := {decide := true})

        contrapose! h₅
        have : b ≥ 7 := by linarith
        have : c ≥ 7 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      cases' this with hb2 hb6
      · subst_vars
        have : c = 2 ∨ c = 3 := by
          contrapose! h₆
          have : c ≥ 4 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        cases' this with hc2 hc3
        · subst_vars
          simp_all
        · subst_vars
          simp_all
      · subst_vars
        have : c = 11 := by
          contrapose! h₆
          have : c ≥ 12 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        subst_vars
        simp_all
    · subst_vars
      have : b = 5 := by
        contrapose! h₅
        have : b ≥ 6 := by linarith
        have : c ≥ 6 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      subst_vars
      have : c = 7 := by
        contrapose! h₆
        have : c ≥ 8 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      subst_vars
      simp_all
  · rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl) <;> simp_all

ext ⟨a, b, c⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Prod.mk.inj_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨⟨ha, hb, hc⟩, ⟨hab, hbc⟩, ⟨d₁, hd₁⟩, ⟨d₂, hd₂⟩, ⟨d₃, hd₃⟩⟩ := h
    have : a ≤ 3 := by
      contrapose! hab
      nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₁, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₂, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₃]
    interval_cases a <;> simp_all
    <;> try { omega }
    <;> try {
      have : b ≤ 6 := by
        contrapose! hbc
        nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₁, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₂, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₃]
      interval_cases b <;> simp_all
      <;> try { omega }
      <;> try {
        have : c ≤ 11 := by
          nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₁, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₂, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₃]
        interval_cases c <;> simp_all
        <;> try { omega }
      }
    }
  · rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl) <;>
      (try { use 2; use 2; use 2; norm_num }) <;>
      (try { use 2; use 2; use 3; norm_num }) <;>
      (try { use 2; use 6; use 11; norm_num }) <;>
      (try { use 3; use 5; use 7; norm_num })

apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨a, b, c, ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩, ⟨hab, hbc⟩, ⟨d₁, hd₁⟩, ⟨d₂, hd₂⟩, ⟨d₃, hd₃⟩, rfl⟩
    have h₁ : a ≤ b := hab
    have h₂ : b ≤ c := hbc
    have h₃ : 0 < a := ha
    have h₄ : 0 < b := hb
    have h₅ : 0 < c := hc
    have h₆ : a * b - c = 2 ^ d₁ := hd₁
    have h₇ : b * c - a = 2 ^ d₂ := hd₂
    have h₈ : c * a - b = 2 ^ d₃ := hd₃
    clear hd₁ hd₂ hd₃
    norm_cast at h₆ h₇ h₈ ⊢
    have : a ≤ 3 := by
      · contrapose! h₆
        nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₁]
    have : b ≤ 6 := by
      · contrapose! h₇
        nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₂]
    have : c ≤ 11 := by
      · contrapose! h₈
        nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) d₃]
    interval_cases a <;> interval_cases b <;> interval_cases c <;>
      simp_all (config := {decide := true})
  · rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl) <;>
      refine' ⟨_, _, _, ⟨by decide, by decide, by decide⟩, ⟨by decide, by decide⟩, ⟨0, by decide⟩, ⟨0, by decide⟩, ⟨0, by decide⟩, rfl⟩

ext ⟨a, b, c⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Prod.mk.inj_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨⟨ha, hb, hc⟩, ⟨hab, hbc⟩, ⟨d, hd⟩, ⟨e, he⟩, ⟨f, hf⟩⟩ := h
    have : a ≤ b ∧ b ≤ c := ⟨hab, hbc⟩
    have h₁ : a * b - c = 2 ^ d := hd
    have h₂ : b * c - a = 2 ^ e := he
    have h₃ : c * a - b = 2 ^ f := hf
    have h₄ : 0 < a := ha
    have h₅ : 0 < b := hb
    have h₆ : 0 < c := hc
    clear ha hb hc hab hbc hd he hf
    have : a ≤ b ∧ b ≤ c := by assumption
    cases' le_total a 2 with ha2 ha2 <;> cases' le_total b 2 with hb2 hb2 <;> cases' le_total c 2 with hc2 hc2 <;>
      simp_all [pow_succ, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    all_goals
      try
        { omega }
  · rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl) <;>
      (try
        { refine' ⟨⟨by norm_num, by norm_num, by norm_num⟩, ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩,
            ⟨0, by norm_num⟩, ⟨0, by norm_num⟩, ⟨0, by norm_num⟩⟩ }) <;>
      (try
        { refine' ⟨⟨by norm_num, by norm_num, by norm_num⟩, ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩,
            ⟨1, by norm_num⟩, ⟨1, by norm_num⟩, ⟨0, by norm_num⟩⟩ }) <;>
      (try
        { refine' ⟨⟨by norm_num, by norm_num, by norm_num⟩, ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩,
            ⟨3, by norm_num⟩, ⟨6, by norm_num⟩, ⟨4, by norm_num⟩⟩ }) <;>
      refine' ⟨⟨by norm_num, by norm_num, by norm_num⟩, ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩,
          ⟨4, by norm_num⟩, ⟨5, by norm_num⟩, ⟨4, by norm_num⟩⟩
